# seerr_radarr_server (Resource)

Manage Seerr Radarr server settings via /api/v1/settings/radarr.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "seerr_radarr_quality_profile" "movies" {
  url     = var.radarr_url
  api_key = var.radarr_api_key
  name    = "HD-1080p"
}

resource "seerr_radarr_server" "movies" {
  url                    = var.radarr_url
  api_key                = var.radarr_api_key
  quality_profile_id     = data.seerr_radarr_quality_profile.movies.quality_profile_id
  active_directory       = "/media/movies"
  minimum_availability   = "announced"
  enable_scan            = true
  tag_requests_with_user = true
  is_default             = true
}
```

The provider resolves Seerr's required `activeProfileName` automatically from
Radarr when `quality_profile_name` is omitted.

### Example With Explicit Quality Profile Name

```terraform
resource "seerr_radarr_server" "movies" {
  url                    = var.radarr_url
  api_key                = var.radarr_api_key
  quality_profile_id     = 4
  quality_profile_name   = "HD-1080p"
  active_directory       = "/media/movies"
  enable_scan            = true
  tag_requests_with_user = true
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `active_directory` (String)
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive)
- `quality_profile_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `base_url` (String)
- `extra_payload_json` (String)
- `hostname` (String)
- `enable_scan` (Boolean)
- `is_4k` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `minimum_availability` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `port` (Number)
- `prevent_search` (Boolean)
- `quality_profile_name` (String)
- `sync_enabled` (Boolean)
- `tag_requests_with_user` (Boolean)
- `tags` (List of Number)
- `url` (String)
- `use_ssl` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `response_json` (String)
- `server_id` (Number)
